holoscript-mcp.description: HoloScript MCP — parse, compile, render, codebase, team board, knowledge (live tool count via GET https://mcp.holoscript.net/health → tools)

mcp-orchestrator.description: MCP Orchestrator — tool discovery and knowledge federation across registered servers (live entry count via GET .../health → knowledge_entries)

holoscript-local.description: HoloScript MCP — local dev (fastest, use for development). Falls back to holoscript-mcp (production) if local fails to start.
